name: github-pr-reviewer
description: Automatically review GitHub pull requests using an LLM (any host provider, incl. local Ollama). Posts review comments directly to the PR via the GitHub API.

GITHUB_TOKEN_SECRET.description: Secret path for the GitHub token. Either a PAT secret path (e.g. 'github/token'), OR a GitHub App installation token via 'github_app:<owner>' (e.g. 'github_app:ehelbig1') — the controller mints a short-lived, repo-scoped installation token (RFC 0008). For the App scheme, also grant the module allowed_secrets: ['github_app:<owner>'].

REPOSITORY.description: GitHub repository in owner/repo format (e.g. 'myorg/myrepo'). Used as a scope guard: PR events for any other repository are skipped.

LLM_PROVIDER.description: LLM provider for review generation. Optional — if unset, the host's configured default is used. 'ollama' runs a LOCAL model with NO API key (also forced automatically for Tier-1 actors). For external providers the key is resolved from the platform vault (e.g. 'anthropic/api_key') — it is NOT a module secret, so no LLM key is configured here.

LLM_MODEL.description: Model name for review generation (e.g. 'gpt-4o-mini', 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', 'llama3'). Optional — defaults per provider.

setup_instructions.title: Provide a GitHub credential
setup_instructions.detail: Either (a) a Personal Access Token with 'repo' / 'pull_requests:write' scope stored as a secret (set_secret key_path='github/token'), or (b) a GitHub App installation via 'github_app:<owner>' — set GITHUB_TOKEN_SECRET to 'github_app:<owner>' and grant the module allowed_secrets: ['github_app:<owner>']. Posting review comments requires WRITE (pull_requests) permission; a read-only App fetches the diff and generates the review but cannot post (the node output still contains the review).

setup_instructions.title: Choose an LLM (no module key needed)
setup_instructions.detail: Review generation goes through the host LLM service, which resolves provider keys from the platform vault and enforces the actor's tier ceiling. For a LOCAL model with no API key, set LLM_PROVIDER='ollama' (or run the workflow under a Tier-1 actor, which forces local). For an external provider, set LLM_PROVIDER='anthropic'|'openai'|'gemini' and ensure that provider's key exists in the platform vault (e.g. 'anthropic/api_key') — it is NOT configured on this module. Leave LLM_PROVIDER unset to use the host default.

setup_instructions.title: Trigger on pull_request events
setup_instructions.detail: This module reads the PR event from the node INPUT (envelope.input), not config. Wire it to a GitHub 'pull_request' webhook trigger, or — to test manually — pass a sample PR 'opened'/'synchronize' event JSON as the node input. With no input it returns a 'nothing to review' message instead of failing.
